vikriti.imbalance: Pitta excess with secondary Vata aggravation

reasoning: Prakriti leans Pitta-Kapha due to lifelong tendencies toward strong digestion, heat (red face, irritability), and moderate stability. Vikriti shows Pitta excess (elevated liver enzymes, cholesterol, heartburn, redness, dark urine, insomnia) with secondary Vata aggravation (tired but wired, loose stools, night sweating) from dietary and lifestyle factors (fried food, alcohol, coffee).
